name: Permanent Disability Holladay

mainEntity.name: Permanent disability benefits after work injury Holladay UT?
mainEntity.text: Permanent disability benefits after work injury Holladay UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Scheduled impairment rating x body part value, plus wage loss if unemployable. Paid as lump sum or monthly.

suggestedAnswer.text: Holladay: MD rates impairment post-MMI. Utah schedule lists values (e.g., leg loss high). Insurers undervalue; attorney challenges ratings, maximizes PPD.

description: Scheduled impairment rating x body part value, plus wage loss if unemployable. Paid as lump sum or monthly.
